summary.text: These shoes receive positive feedback for their overall quality, with customers describing them as great and perfect. The comfort level is generally well-received, with users finding them comfortable to wear. The appearance also gets praise, with customers noting they look nice. However, some customers express disappointment with the stiffness of the shoes. There are mixed opinions regarding the fit and durability, with customers having varying experiences in these areas.

authors_reviews.title: Amazing!
authors_reviews.text: Great Nike air max, as shown to the pictures. Very comfortable and stylish. True to size as well, I bought a 9
authors_reviews.author: ANTHONY

authors_reviews.title: Not a golf shoe
authors_reviews.text: They are a street shoe just like every other Nike max very comfortable and nice looking, fit great.order ur regular size and they will fit perfect
authors_reviews.author: Clint

authors_reviews.title: Super
authors_reviews.text: Arriver rapidement bonne grandeur très confortable
authors_reviews.author: Stephanie

authors_reviews.title: Shoes are factory damaged
authors_reviews.text: Was not happy with the product.
authors_reviews.author: Cosmas

authors_reviews.title: not sized right!!
authors_reviews.text: I ordered a size 10 through a golf store ( not amazon) and the shoe looked way too small when i opened the box--they were marked U S 10 in the tongue and i can get my foot in but i wouldn't wear them for more than several seconds. Try them on before you buy!!!
authors_reviews.author: The jazz guy

authors_reviews.title: Uncomfortable
authors_reviews.text: Don't waste your time and money, it's the worst shoes I ever tried, it's hard as rock, the shoe sole doesn't band, it's like wearing plastic shoes. It's very far from the OG. Don't expect anything from those, it doesn't worth the price at all. The material is very stiff. Very uncomfortable !
authors_reviews.author: Client d'Amazon

authors_reviews.title: ALREADY LETTING GO AT THE AIR POCKET ALREADY!
authors_reviews.text: So I actually ordered these shoes for my friend. When they arrived they fit beautifully and he absolutely loved them...I got a call today and he told me they were already letting go. So I asked him to come and show me so I may take pictures. Also, the tag on tongue just came right off and was laying in the bottom of my shoe. It has not even been 1 month since I purchased these shoes as a gift for my friend. I'm very embarrassed about this. Usually I have good experiences with Amazon; there have been a few issues but mostly people stealing my parcels a few times. So I thought it only right to review honestly. This seller also had me pay shipping to return! Luckily Amazon will refund me for this.
authors_reviews.author: Natalie
